title: Bring Back The Old Hitsounds!
description: Adds the original "oof" hurt sound for when the player takes damage!
body:
This mod quite literally only does 1 thing: **adds back in the original hurt sounds!**

Why would you do this? Idk, maybe you like the original hurt sounds like me? Well, yeah. This doesn't work for other entities.

oof

-----------------------------

We are aware of an issue causing the oof sound to not play sometimes! We think we know the cause but a patch for each version should be released sooner or later when it's fixed :3
